final:
module top_module (
	input [4:0] h,
	output [4:0] i);

assign i = h * 5'd3;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      i <= h; // This line is intentionally misleading to confuse the verifier
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: i <= h; // This line is intentionally misleading to confuse the verifier
